description: Transition the manual deployment in the 'webapp-prod' namespace to GitOps using Rancher's Continuous Delivery (Fleet). Replace the existing 'legacy-frontend' deployment and 'legacy-frontend-svc' service with a Fleet GitRepo named 'guestbook-gitops' in the 'fleet-local' namespace. The GitRepo must sync from https://github.com/rancher/fleet-examples (branch: 'master', path: 'simple') and target the 'webapp-prod' namespace. Ensure the new 'frontend' deployment reaches a Running state in the 'webapp-prod' namespace. Login to Rancher at https://localhost with credentials admin / Admin12345678!
